name: White Aura Whale
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>白闘気白鯨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ホワイト・オーラ・ホエール</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
1 WATER Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner WATER monsters
When this card is Synchro Summoned: You can destroy all your opponent's Attack Position monsters. This card can make up to 2 attacks on monsters during each Battle Phase. If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage. If this card in your possession is destroyed by an opponent's card and sent to your GY: You can banish 1 other WATER monster from your GY; Special Summon this card as a Tuner.
mnst_eff:
1 WATER Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner WATER monsters
When this card is Synchro Summoned: You can destroy all your opponent's Attack Position monsters. This card can make up to 2 attacks on monsters during each Battle Phase. If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage. If this card in your possession is destroyed by an opponent's card and sent to your GY: You can banish 1 other WATER monster from your GY; Special Summon this card as a Tuner.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
stat_change: Treats itself as a Tuner monster
mst: Destroys your opponent's Attack Position Monster Cards
summoning: Requires Attribute specific Tuner Synchro Materials
Requires Attribute specific non-Tuner Synchro Materials
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
attack: Can make multiple attacks on monsters
